title: Backported Animal Variants
description: Adds new animal variants from 1.21.5 to older versions
body:
Adds farm animal variants and updated cow model introduced in 1.21.5:
- Cold Chicken (and its Blue Egg)
- Cold Pig
- Cold Cow
- Warm Chicken (and its Brown Egg)
- Warm Pig
- Warm Cow
- Cow, Mooshroom model update
- Sheep texture update
